_comment: Browser-demo fixture for Step 5. Single audio item, no recipes, no actor — exercises the default-behavior path through the engine + composition + audio renderer + chrome shell. Cover art is a real POC URL with CORS *. Audio is MDN's CC0-licensed T-Rex roar (39KB, public, has CORS) — small + reliable for browser smoke. Replace with a creator's actual song URL via the platform's /media/play/r2key/... proxy in production.
name: Demo — Bare Audio
description: Step 5 browser demo. One audio item, default behavior, full chrome.
